The '''laser rifle''',<ref name="Cataclysm">''[[The High Republic: Cataclysm]]''</ref> or '''laser Rifle''', was a model of [[rifle]] that utilized [[laser]] technology.<ref name="TVE" /> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] [[Rebel trooper|troopers]] used Laser Rifles during the [[Battle of Hoth]].<ref name="Ep5" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
